headline: How Dollar Tree’s NASCAR Dollar Tree 301 Deal and Fan Promotions Could Shape Dollar Tree (DLTR) Investors
summary: In May 2026, Dollar Tree and Speedway Motorsports announced that Dollar Tree had been named entitlement sponsor of the NASCAR Cup Series race at New Hampshire Motor Speedway, the Dollar Tree 301, and Official Value Retailer of Speedway Motorsports, with extensive promotional rights across 10 speedway properties and 15 race weekends. This move ties Dollar Tree’s value-focused brand directly to NASCAR’s large, loyal fan base through gift card promotions, fan-zone activations, and driver-linked...
